arts.ttl: 'I flopped at Liverpool - but I helped convince Virgil van Dijk successor to sign'
arts.sum: Liverpool have one of their flops to thank for the signing of Ibrahima Konate, who has gone on to become one of the club's most important players

arts.ttl: I'd only sell Darwin Nunez for £100m - Liverpool cannot let him leave now
arts.sum: Didi Hamann wants Liverpool to keep hold of Darwin Nunez this month as he believes his old club could win the Quadruple

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Lille: Can anyone stop Arne Slot from winning Champions League?
arts.sum: Liverpool will host Lille at Anfield in the Champions League on Tuesday night, and the Reds are arguably the favourites to win the competition.

arts.sum: Liverpool will be without two players for their penultimate Champions League league phase match with Lille due to injury after Arne Slot confirmed their absences

arts.ttl: Liverpool statement performance: Significance of Brentford win on Premier League title race ahead of Ipswich Town clash
arts.sum: Liverpool's win against Brentford may be decisive in the Premier League title race, and a similar display against Ipswich Town on Saturday will be enough to for victory.

arts.ttl: Concern over big-name Liverpool star could lead to transfer solution
arts.sum: Liverpool reportedly have some concern over the dip in form of ageing left-back Andrew Robertson this season, which could see them turn to the market. The Reds look like they could finally do with bringing in a long-term replacement for Robertson on the left-hand side of their defence, but it doesn’t look like a deal […] The post Concern over big-name Liverpool star could lead to transfer solution appeared first on CaughtOffside.
